name: Hakase Anime
bio_short: Your anime professor is in. Rankings, recommendations & deep dives — if it hits different, we cover it. New video every week. 博士
bio_long:
Welcome to Hakase Anime — your guide to the best anime has to offer.

We break down rankings, hidden gems, must-watch series, and the moments that made anime history. Whether you're new to anime or a seasoned veteran, there's always something worth discovering.

📌 New videos weekly
🎌 Top lists · Character breakdowns · Season recaps · Lore dives

Drop your favorite anime in the comments — the professor is always taking notes. 博士

brand.character_concept: Cool anime professor archetype: short dark hair, round glasses with glowing blue lenses, dark high-collar jacket with subtle tech details, confident smirk
brand.palette: deep purple #1a0a2e background, gold #FFD700 accents, electric blue #4fc3f7 highlights
brand.style: MAPPA-style quality, dramatic cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed

dalle_prompts.profile: Anime character portrait, cool professor archetype: short dark hair, round glasses with glowing blue lenses, dark high-collar jacket, confident smirk. Dramatic deep purple and dark blue background with subtle gold and electric blue lighting. MAPPA-style quality, sharp cinematic shading. Centered square composition, character fills the frame. No text, no watermarks, no logos.
dalle_prompts.banner: Wide anime banner collage featuring iconic moments from multiple famous anime series — intense battles, dramatic power-ups, emotional scenes — each framed as glowing panels or portals against a deep dark purple background with gold particles and electric blue energy effects. Ultra-detailed, cinematic composition, 8K quality, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermarks, no logos.
